requirement_topic.en: GSA Product Certification and Import Conformity for Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 太阳能光伏逆变器的GSA产品认证与进口符合性
requirement_topic.zht: 太陽能光伏逆變器的GSA產品認證與進口符合性

summary.en: The Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) is mandated under the Ghana Standards Authority Act, 2022 (Act 1078) to require conformity assessment for imported electrical and energy equipment. Solar PV inverters fall within the category of solar energy appliances that GSA lists as subject to product certification testing. Imported electrical goods classified as high-risk goods (HRG) require GSA inspection and a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for customs clearance. Exporters should confirm whether a pre-shipment conformity inspection or a GSA-recognised product certificate route applies to their specific inverter HS code and shipment.
summary.zh: 加纳标准局（GSA）依据《2022年加纳标准局法》（第1078号法案），对进口电气和能源设备实施符合性评定。太阳能光伏逆变器属于GSA列明须进行产品认证测试的太阳能电器类别。被列为高风险货物（HRG）的进口电气产品须经GSA检验并取得符合性证书（CoC）方可清关。出口商应确认其具体逆变器HS编码和货批适用装运前符合性检验还是GSA认可产品证书路径。
summary.zht: 加納標準局（GSA）依據《2022年加納標準局法》（第1078號法案），對進口電氣和能源設備實施符合性評定。太陽能光伏逆變器屬於GSA列明須進行產品認證測試的太陽能電器類別。被列為高風險貨物（HRG）的進口電氣產品須經GSA檢驗並取得符合性證書（CoC）方可清關。出口商應確認其具體逆變器HS編碼和貨批適用裝運前符合性檢驗還是GSA認可產品證書路徑。

standards_or_laws: GSA Product Certification Scheme — solar energy appliances scope
Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for high-risk goods at Ghana customs

summary.en: Chinese exporters commonly hold GB/T 37408-2019 (technical requirements for PV inverters) and CQC or CCC marks for the domestic market. These Chinese certificates do not substitute for Ghana GSA conformity documents, but the underlying test reports (IEC 62109-based) may support a Ghana conformity submission where an accredited lab issued them.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有GB/T 37408-2019（光伏逆变器技术要求）及国内市场CQC或CCC认证。这些中国证书不能替代加纳GSA符合性文件，但若基础测试报告由认可实验室出具且基于IEC 62109，则可能支持加纳符合性申报。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有GB/T 37408-2019（光伏逆變器技術要求）及國內市場CQC或CCC認證。這些中國證書不能替代加納GSA符合性文件，但若基礎測試報告由認可實驗室出具且基於IEC 62109，則可能支持加納符合性申報。

gap.en: The exporter should confirm the Ghana HS code for their inverter model, engage a GSA-accredited or approved conformity assessment body, and obtain a Certificate of Conformity before shipment. Chinese domestic certificates cannot substitute for the CoC and should not be presented as Ghana clearance evidence without explicit acceptance by the GSA or approved body.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认其逆变器型号的加纳HS编码，委托GSA认可或批准的符合性评定机构，并在出货前取得符合性证书。中国国内证书不能替代CoC，未经GSA或认可机构明确接受，不应作为加纳清关证据提交。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認其逆變器型號的加納HS編碼，委託GSA認可或批准的符合性評定機構，並在出貨前取得符合性證書。中國國內證書不能替代CoC，未經GSA或認可機構明確接受，不應作為加納清關證據提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for solar energy appliances classified as high-risk goods imported into Ghana; CoC required for customs clearance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard; CQC is voluntary; CCC mandatory scope does not include standard grid-tied PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GSA conformity assessment and a Certificate of Conformity are required for solar PV inverter imports into Ghana. Chinese domestic certificates do not substitute; engage a GSA-approved body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口太阳能光伏逆变器入加纳须经GSA符合性评定并取得符合性证书。中国国内证书不能替代；出货前须委托GSA批准机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口太陽能光伏逆變器入加納須經GSA符合性評定並取得符合性證書。中國國內證書不能替代；出貨前須委託GSA批准機構。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Commission LI 2461 Inverter Standards and Labelling Regulations (2022)
requirement_topic.zh: 能源委员会LI 2461逆变器标准与标签规例（2022年）
requirement_topic.zht: 能源委員會LI 2461逆變器標準與標籤規例（2022年）

summary.en: The Renewable Energy (Standards and Labelling) (Inverters) Regulations, 2022 (LI 2461), made under the Energy Commission Act 1997 (Act 541), establish minimum performance and labelling requirements for inverters placed on the Ghanaian market. The regulations mandate that inverters meet specified efficiency and technical parameters and carry required labels to assist consumers and enforcement officers in identifying compliant products. Compliance with LI 2461 is required for market access and may intersect with GSA product certification for inverter equipment.
summary.zh: 依据《1997年能源委员会法》（第541章）颁布的《2022年可再生能源（标准与标签）（逆变器）规例》（LI 2461），就在加纳市场销售的逆变器确立最低性能及标签要求。该规例要求逆变器满足规定的效率和技术参数，并粘贴所要求的标签，以协助消费者和执法人员识别合规产品。符合LI 2461是进入市场的前提条件，且可能与GSA的逆变器产品认证相互关联。
summary.zht: 依據《1997年能源委員會法》（第541章）頒布的《2022年可再生能源（標準與標籤）（逆變器）規例》（LI 2461），就在加納市場銷售的逆變器確立最低性能及標籤要求。該規例要求逆變器滿足規定的效率和技術參數，並粘貼所要求的標籤，以協助消費者和執法人員識別合規產品。符合LI 2461是進入市場的前提條件，且可能與GSA的逆變器產品認證相互關聯。

standards_or_laws: Renewable Energy (Standards and Labelling) (Inverters) Regulations, 2022 — LI 2461

summary.en: Chinese inverters may carry GB/T 37408-2019 performance ratings and Chinese energy efficiency labels. These do not automatically satisfy LI 2461 labelling and performance requirements for the Ghanaian market. The exporter should verify whether their product's rated efficiency and technical data meet the LI 2461 parameters and arrange compliant labelling for Ghana.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器可能具有GB/T 37408-2019性能额定值和中国能效标签，但这些不自动满足加纳市场LI 2461的标签和性能要求。出口商应核实产品的额定效率和技术数据是否符合LI 2461参数，并为加纳安排合规标签。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器可能具有GB/T 37408-2019性能額定值和中國能效標籤，但這些不自動滿足加納市場LI 2461的標籤和性能要求。出口商應核實產品的額定效率和技術數據是否符合LI 2461參數，並為加納安排合規標籤。

standards_or_laws: China energy efficiency labelling scheme (MEPS label)

gap.en: Chinese efficiency labels and GB/T performance documentation are not substitutes for LI 2461 compliance. The exporter should obtain the LI 2461 text from the Energy Commission, confirm the applicable efficiency tiers and technical parameters for their inverter type, and arrange Ghana-compliant labelling before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国能效标签和GB/T性能文件不能替代LI 2461合规。出口商应从能源委员会取得LI 2461全文，确认适用于其逆变器类型的效率等级和技术参数，并在出货前安排符合加纳要求的标签。
gap.zht: 中國能效標籤和GB/T性能文件不能替代LI 2461合規。出口商應從能源委員會取得LI 2461全文，確認適用於其逆變器類型的效率等級和技術參數，並在出貨前安排符合加納要求的標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for inverters placed on the Ghanaian market under LI 2461; Energy Commission-administered
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended standard; Chinese energy efficiency labels are not required for export

source.publisher: Ghana Energy Commission — Standards and Labelling Programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LI 2461 inverter standards and labelling requirements are mandatory for the Ghanaian market. Chinese performance labels do not substitute; confirm LI 2461 parameters and arrange compliant Ghana labelling before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LI 2461逆变器标准与标签要求对加纳市场属强制性规定。中国性能标签不能替代；出货前应确认LI 2461参数并安排符合加纳要求的标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LI 2461逆變器標準與標籤要求對加納市場屬強制性規定。中國性能標籤不能替代；出貨前應確認LI 2461參數並安排符合加納要求的標籤。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109 Safety Requirements for PV Inverters — Ghana Market Expectation
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器IEC 62109安全要求——加纳市场期望
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器IEC 62109安全要求——加納市場期望

summary.en: IEC 62109-1 (general safety requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (specific requirements for inverters) are the internationally recognised safety standards for solar PV inverters. Ghana's GSA, as a member of the IEC, references international standards in its conformity assessment activities, and IEC 62109 is the benchmark safety standard expected by the Ghanaian market and GSA-approved conformity assessment bodies for PV inverters. Test reports from IECEE CB Scheme-accredited laboratories based on IEC 62109-1/-2 are likely to support Ghana conformity submissions.
summary.zh: IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆变器专项要求）是太阳能光伏逆变器的国际公认安全标准。加纳标准局作为IEC成员，在其符合性评定活动中参照国际标准，IEC 62109是加纳市场及GSA认可符合性评定机构对光伏逆变器的基准安全标准。由IECEE CB体系认可实验室依据IEC 62109-1/-2出具的测试报告，有望支持加纳符合性申报。
summary.zht: IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆變器專項要求）是太陽能光伏逆變器的國際公認安全標準。加納標準局作為IEC成員，在其符合性評定活動中參照國際標準，IEC 62109是加納市場及GSA認可符合性評定機構對光伏逆變器的基準安全標準。由IECEE CB體系認可實驗室依據IEC 62109-1/-2出具的測試報告，有望支持加納符合性申報。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2:2011 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters are commonly certified to GB/T 37408-2019 and may hold IECEE CB reports based on IEC 62109. Where the Chinese manufacturer holds an IECEE CB report from an accredited laboratory, this is the most useful supporting document for Ghana conformity assessment. A GB/T 37408 report alone is not equivalent but the underlying test data may be leveraged.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器通常依据GB/T 37408-2019认证，并可能持有基于IEC 62109的IECEE CB报告。若中国制造商持有认可实验室出具的IECEE CB报告，则该报告是支持加纳符合性评定最有用的文件。单独的GB/T 37408报告并不等同，但其基础测试数据可能被参考利用。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器通常依據GB/T 37408-2019認證，並可能持有基於IEC 62109的IECEE CB報告。若中國製造商持有認可實驗室出具的IECEE CB報告，則該報告是支持加納符合性評定最有用的文件。單獨的GB/T 37408報告並不等同，但其基礎測試數據可能被參考利用。

standards_or_laws: IECEE CB report based on IEC 62109-1/-2 (if held)

gap.en: Manufacturers should obtain or verify existing IECEE CB test reports based on IEC 62109-1/-2 from an accredited lab. Where only a GB/T 37408 report exists, assess whether it was conducted by an IECEE-accredited laboratory and whether the test scope maps to IEC 62109 requirements, or commission supplemental testing.
gap.zh: 制造商应取得或核实认可实验室依据IEC 62109-1/-2出具的IECEE CB测试报告。若仅有GB/T 37408报告，应评估其是否由IECEE认可实验室出具，测试范围是否覆盖IEC 62109要求，必要时委托补充测试。
gap.zht: 製造商應取得或核實認可實驗室依據IEC 62109-1/-2出具的IECEE CB測試報告。若僅有GB/T 37408報告，應評估其是否由IECEE認可實驗室出具，測試範圍是否覆蓋IEC 62109要求，必要時委託補充測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as the applicable international safety standard referenced by GSA for PV inverter conformity assessment in Ghana
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended standard; IEC 62109 adoption is partial in Chinese national standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62109-1/-2 is the benchmark safety standard for PV inverters in Ghana. An IECEE CB report from an accredited lab is the most portable supporting document; a GB/T 37408-only dossier is not equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62109-1/-2是加纳光伏逆变器的基准安全标准。认可实验室出具的IECEE CB报告是最具通用性的支持文件；仅有GB/T 37408档案并不等同。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62109-1/-2是加納光伏逆變器的基準安全標準。認可實驗室出具的IECEE CB報告是最具通用性的支持文件；僅有GB/T 37408檔案並不等同。

requirement_topic.en: ECG / NEDCo Grid Connection and Net Metering Code 2023 — 50 Hz, Anti-Islanding, Power Factor
requirement_topic.zh: ECG / NEDCo并网与《2023年净计量规范》——50 Hz、反孤岛、功率因数
requirement_topic.zht: ECG / NEDCo併網與《2023年淨計量規範》——50 Hz、反孤島、功率因數

summary.en: Ghana operates on a 50 Hz, 230 V (single-phase) / 400 V (three-phase) grid. The Energy Commission Net Metering Code 2023 (made under Act 832) governs grid-connected renewable energy generating systems feeding into the ECG and NEDCo distribution networks. Key technical requirements include: inverter operation at 50 Hz; anti-islanding protection; power factor ≥ 0.98 at rated output; single-phase inverters up to 13.8 kVA; three-phase or special consideration above 13.8 kVA; smart net meter installation; compliance with the Net Metering Sub-Code technical annex; and registration with the Energy Commission before connection.
summary.zh: 加纳电网运行于50 Hz、230 V（单相）/ 400 V（三相）。依据第832章制定的《2023年能源委员会净计量规范》管辖向ECG和NEDCo配电网络馈电的并网可再生能源发电系统。主要技术要求包括：逆变器在50 Hz下运行；具备反孤岛保护；额定输出功率因数≥0.98；单相逆变器上限13.8 kVA；超过13.8 kVA需三相或特殊考虑；安装智能净电表；遵守净计量子规范技术附录；并网前须向能源委员会登记。
summary.zht: 加納電網運行於50 Hz、230 V（單相）/ 400 V（三相）。依據第832章制定的《2023年能源委員會淨計量規範》管轄向ECG和NEDCo配電網絡饋電的併網可再生能源發電系統。主要技術要求包括：逆變器在50 Hz下運行；具備反孤島保護；額定輸出功率因數≥0.98；單相逆變器上限13.8 kVA；超過13.8 kVA需三相或特殊考慮；安裝智能淨電表；遵守淨計量子規範技術附錄；併網前須向能源委員會登記。

summary.en: Chinese grid-connected PV inverters are designed for 50 Hz and commonly reference GB/T 19964-2024 (technical requirements for PV power station access to power systems) and GB/T 37408 for grid interaction. Anti-islanding is addressed in GB/T 37408, but the specific power factor threshold (≥ 0.98), capacity thresholds, and registration requirements in Ghana differ from Chinese domestic grid codes and must be verified against the Net Metering Code 2023.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器为50 Hz设计，通常参照GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）和GB/T 37408处理电网交互。GB/T 37408涵盖反孤岛，但加纳的特定功率因数阈值（≥0.98）、容量阈值及登记要求与中国国内并网规范不同，须对照《2023年净计量规范》核实。
summary.zht: 中國併網光伏逆變器為50 Hz設計，通常參照GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）和GB/T 37408處理電網交互。GB/T 37408涵蓋反孤島，但加納的特定功率因數閾值（≥0.98）、容量閾值及登記要求與中國國內併網規範不同，須對照《2023年淨計量規範》核實。

gap.en: Exporters should confirm that inverters are factory-configured for 50 Hz operation and anti-islanding protection meeting the Net Metering Code 2023 parameters. Power factor capability ≥ 0.98 should be verified in the technical datasheet. Energy Commission registration of the installation is required before ECG/NEDCo connection. Installers in Ghana must follow the net metering application portal process.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认逆变器出厂已配置为50 Hz运行并具备符合《2023年净计量规范》参数的反孤岛保护。技术规格表中应核实功率因数能力≥0.98。安装须在ECG/NEDCo并网前向能源委员会登记。加纳安装方须遵循净计量申请门户流程。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認逆變器出廠已配置為50 Hz運行並具備符合《2023年淨計量規範》參數的反孤島保護。技術規格表中應核實功率因數能力≥0.98。安裝須在ECG/NEDCo併網前向能源委員會登記。加納安裝方須遵循淨計量申請門戶流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations; Energy Commission registration required before ECG/NEDCo connection; Net Metering Code 2023 applies
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 19964-2024 and GB/T 37408 anti-islanding requirements are mandatory for grid-connected systems in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana's 50 Hz grid and Net Metering Code 2023 impose specific anti-islanding, power factor, and capacity requirements that must be confirmed in the inverter datasheet and factory configuration before export. Energy Commission registration is mandatory before ECG/NEDCo connection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳50 Hz电网及《2023年净计量规范》规定了特定的反孤岛、功率因数及容量要求，出口前须在逆变器技术规格表和出厂配置中加以确认。ECG/NEDCo并网前须向能源委员会强制登记。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加納50 Hz電網及《2023年淨計量規範》規定了特定的反孤島、功率因數及容量要求，出口前須在逆變器技術規格表和出廠配置中加以確認。ECG/NEDCo併網前須向能源委員會強制登記。
